recent_announcements.summary: Board of Directors of Somany Ceramics Limited at their meeting held today i.e. 13th July, 2026, has, inter-alia, considered and accorded in-principle approval for an investment of up to Rs. 58.80 crore in M/s. Siravit Ceramics Private Limited, by way of acquisition and/or subscription of equity shares and/or preference shares, in one or more tranches, resulting in the Company acquiring up to 49% of its share capital. |SUBJECT: Acquisition
